title: Top 10 history (bar chart race)
note: For each day, the all-time top 10 best results known by that date for each WCA event and metric. Only competitors who were ever in the historical top 30 are kept.
noteZh: 每天截至当日全历史前 10 的演化,覆盖 21 个 WCA 项目和 11 种指标。仅保留曾进入过历史 TOP 30 的选手。
